entities.name: VALUATION METHODS

entities.description: Systematic ways of conducting the valuation and assessment of impacts

entities.name: NATURAL RESOURCE MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The management of natural resources to ensure sustainability and productivity

entities.name: AGRO-ECOSYSTEM SERVICES
entities.description: The benefits provided by agricultural ecosystems to humans

entities.name: THEORETICAL FOUNDATIONS
entities.description: The underlying theories that support the use of valuation methods

entities.name: NATURAL RESOURCES
entities.description: Materials or substances occurring in nature which can be exploited for economic gain

entities.name: SOCIAL NET BENEFITS
entities.description: The overall benefit to society after subtracting costs from total benefits
